about.missionText: To provide a secure, transparent, and tamper-proof digital land registry for the people of Balochistan — eliminating fraud, reducing disputes, and ensuring every citizen's land rights are permanently protected on the blockchain.
about.visionText: A Balochistan where every land record is digitally preserved, instantly verifiable, and immune to corruption — empowering citizens and building trust in government institutions.
about.problem1Desc: Traditional land records kept on paper are vulnerable to fire, flood, loss, and deliberate destruction.
about.problem2Desc: Manual records can be altered by corrupt officials, leading to false ownership claims and land grabbing.
about.problem3Desc: Paper-based approvals take weeks or months. Citizens travel long distances with no guarantee of resolution.
about.problem4Desc: Citizens have no way to independently verify their land status or track the progress of their registration.
about.deptFullName: Revenue & Estate Department, Government of Balochistan
about.deptDescription: The Revenue & Estate Department is responsible for the administration and management of land records across all 35 districts of Balochistan. It maintains Jamabandi, mutation records, and oversees the Patwari system — the backbone of land administration in the province.
about.resp1: Maintenance of land records (Jamabandi, Fard Malkiat)
about.resp2: Registration of land ownership and transfers
about.resp3: Settlement of land disputes through proper legal channels
about.resp4: Collection of land revenue and agricultural income tax
about.resp5: Supervision of Patwari and Tehsildar officers across all districts
about.resp6: Administration of government land and property
about.systemDesc: BLRS is a blockchain-based land registry system built to digitize and secure Balochistan's land records. The system uses Ethereum smart contracts for immutable record keeping, IPFS for decentralized document storage, and NFT certificates as proof of ownership.
about.blockchainDesc: Smart contracts ensure land records cannot be altered once recorded. Every transaction is permanently stored on-chain.
about.ipfsDesc: Land documents are stored on the InterPlanetary File System — censorship-resistant and permanently accessible.
about.nftDesc: Each approved land parcel is minted as an ERC-721 NFT — a blockchain-verified digital certificate of ownership.
